failure.bench_fallback: Monitor logging with manual event notes
failure.suspected_root_cause: Host sent session-only !cad,<ms>,temp before flashed firmware supported the ,temp form.
failure.post_fix_route: Issue #394 is the Sage-owned post-PR #378 bench retest for #322.

firmware_current_checkout.observed_behavior: handle_cad accepts old cad,<ms> path and persists cadence to NVS

process_doc.observed_behavior: documents earlier fast experiment cadence persisting into monitor logging

facts: P02 Experiment Capture attempts created folders but no capture files.
Recovered transcript captured a device NAK for cadence 1000 ms.
PR #378 describes and fixes the same firmware gap for #322 and has merged to main.
Issue #394 is routed to Sage for hardware retest evidence.
interpretation.inference: P02 Experiment Capture failed because host and flashed firmware disagreed on the cadence command contract.
cautions: A red Experiment Capture label while Monitor owns COM6 may be stale UI/error state, not a new root cause.
Do not file a #335 UX issue unless the error survives a clean PR #378 reflash and a freed COM6 port.
Root experiments/ folders are gitignored raw-capture artifacts; this sidecar is the tracked recovery record.

recommended_routing.request: Reflash ESP32 from main, free COM6, confirm !cad,1000,temp ACKs, and confirm CSV plus manifest.json are written.
Re-engage only if a clean post-PR #378 reflash still NAKs the session-only cadence command.
Defer UX follow-up unless the error persists after correct firmware and a free COM6 port.
Bundle this recovery pair with the post-PR #378 retest result because PR #383 is already merged.
